cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste Ramswaroop ji, this is a call from Karnataka Bank. I am calling to inform you that your account has become dormant.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, kya hai yeh dormant account? Thik hai, bataiye.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, it means there have been no transactions in your account for a while. To reactivate it, you will need to visit one of our branches with your official ID proof.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Theek hai, main samajh gaya. Lekin kya yeh phone se nahi ho sakta?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Nahi, sir. As per our policy, reactivation cannot be done over the phone. You must visit a branch.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Ok, ji. Maine samajh liya. Maine ID proof lekar branch jaunga.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, sir. If you have any questions or need assistance, please do not hesitate to ask.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Dhanyavad, ji. Main ab branch jaunga.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, sir. Have a great day.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Aapka bhi din achha ho, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, is there anything else I can assist you with today?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Ok, sir. We appreciate your cooperation. Have a great day.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, we will now end the call.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 198s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: Dormant Account Reactivation: Agent calls to inform a user that their account has become dormant and explains the official, in-branch procedure to reactivate it.
